messages.content: 帮我写个GitHub issue，希望对方部署一个网站供全世界人在线浏览，

下面给你一份可直接复制到 GitHub 的 issue 模板（中英双语），你把项目名、链接、期望域名等按需替换即可。

---

## Title（标题）
Request: Deploy a public website for online viewing worldwide / 请求部署公开网站供全球在线浏览

## Body（正文）

Hi maintainers,

I’m using this project and would like to request a public deployment so people worldwide can browse it online without setting up the environment locally.

### Background / 背景
- Project / 项目：`<project-name>`
- Repository / 仓库：`<repo-link>`
- Purpose / 用途：Allow global users to view and try the content/features via browser  
  让全球用户可以直接通过浏览器访问与体验内容/功能

### Request / 需求
Could you please deploy a hosted version of this site (e.g., GitHub Pages / Vercel / Netlify / Cloudflare Pages), and keep it publicly accessible?

希望你们能部署一个可公开访问的网站版本（例如 GitHub Pages / Vercel / Netlify / Cloudflare Pages 等），并保持持续可访问。

### Expected outcome / 期望结果
- A public URL that works globally / 一个全球可访问的公开链接
- Prefer HTTPS / 最好支持 HTTPS
- (Optional) Custom domain: `<your-domain>` /（可选）自定义域名：`<your-domain>`
- (Optional) Automated deployment from main branch /（可选）从 main 分支自动部署

### Notes / 补充信息
- If you prefer, I can open a PR to add deployment configuration (e.g., GitHub Actions workflow) and documentation.  
  如果你们愿意，我也可以提 PR 来补充部署配置（如 GitHub Actions）和部署文档。
- Any constraints (cost, infra, region restrictions) are okay—please let me know what you prefer.  
  若有成本、基础设施或地区限制也没问题，请告知你们更偏好的方案。

Thanks!

---

如果你告诉我：对方项目的技术栈（静态站/React/Vue/Next.js）、仓库地址、你更希望用哪种平台（GitHub Pages/Vercel等），我可以把 issue 写得更贴合并附上可用的最小部署方案。
他是一个书籍，我希望他能够提供pdf下载链接以外的内容，比如在线的阅读网站

下面是一份更贴合“书籍项目：除了 PDF 下载，希望提供在线阅读网站”的 GitHub issue（中英双语），可直接复制粘贴。你把尖括号里的内容替换即可。

---

## Title
Feature request: Provide an online reading website (in addition to PDF download) / 功能请求：提供在线阅读网站（不止 PDF 下载）

## Body
Hi maintainers,

Thanks for publishing this book. Currently the main way to read it is via PDF download. I’d like to request an online reading website so readers can browse the content directly in the browser.

维护者你好，感谢发布这本书。目前主要的阅读方式是下载 PDF。我希望能增加一个“在线阅读网站”，方便读者直接在浏览器中阅读与检索。

### Why / 原因
- PDF is less friendly on mobile and for quick navigation/search  
  PDF 在手机端阅读、快速跳转与检索上不太方便
- A web version improves accessibility and sharing (deep links to chapters)  
  网页版更利于可访问性与分享（可直接链接到章节/小节）
- Better SEO and discoverability  
  更利于搜索引擎收录与传播

### Request / 需求
Could you provide a web-hosted version of the book, in addition to the PDF download link?

希望在保留 PDF 下载的同时，提供一个可公开访问的在线阅读站点。

### Suggested approaches / 建议实现方式（任选其一）
- If the source is Markdown: deploy via **GitHub Pages** using **MkDocs / Docusaurus / GitBook / mdBook / VuePress**  
  若源码是 Markdown：可用 MkDocs / Docusaurus / GitBook / mdBook / VuePress 等生成站点并用 GitHub Pages 部署
- If the source is LaTeX: generate **HTML** (e.g., LaTeX → HTML) and host it, or publish a chapter-based HTML build  
  若源码是 LaTeX：可考虑生成 HTML 并托管，或按章节输出 HTML
- Host on GitHub Pages / Vercel / Netlify / Cloudflare Pages  
  部署平台可选 GitHub Pages / Vercel / Netlify / Cloudflare Pages

### Expected outcome / 期望效果
- Public URL for online reading (works worldwide)  
  提供一个全球可访问的在线阅读链接
- Table of contents + chapter navigation  
  有目录与章节导航
- Full-text search (optional but very helpful)  
  全文搜索（可选，但很有帮助）
- Keep PDF link available  
  继续保留 PDF 下载链接

### I can help / 我可以协助
If you’re open to it, I can submit a PR to add the build & deployment config (e.g., GitHub Actions) and update the README with the online-reading link.

如果你们愿意，我也可以提 PR：补充构建与部署配置（如 GitHub Actions），并在 README 添加在线阅读入口链接。

Thanks!

---

如果你告诉我这本书的仓库链接，以及它的源文件格式（Markdown 还是 LaTeX / AsciiDoc 等），我可以再帮你把 issue 写得更具体，并附一套“最少改动”的部署方案（例如 GitHub Pages + Actions 的配置思路）。
源格式是pdf，你只需要输出英文，也不用写各种标题

Hi maintainers, thanks for sharing this book.

Right now it’s only available as a PDF download. Would you consider providing an online reading website as well, so people can read it directly in the browser without downloading the file?

A web version would be easier to use on mobile, allow chapter/section navigation and deep links, and make it easier to share and search. Even a simple solution (hosting an HTML-based viewer with the PDF embedded, or converting the PDF into a web-readable format) would be very helpful.

I’m happy to help with setup or a PR if you’re open to it.

I’d like to request an online reading website so readers can browse the content directly in the browser, so people can read it directly in the browser without downloading the file?
  
这句话改成强调无论电脑手机都可以轻松阅读
I’d like to request an online reading website so readers can easily read the content in the browser on both desktop and mobile, without needing to download the PDF.
